title: Bomb Barrage
description: Add thirty-two bombs to the game. From fireworks to letting you have the ability to strike enemies down with lightning.
body:
# Bomb Barrage
## The run-down.
A small mod that adds bombs. There are thirty-two different bombs, each with different abilities. From bombs that make you move automatically, to bombs that make you get struck down by Zeus himself! Bombs do not harm the environment in this mod, so you are free to do what you want, without many  consequences.

### QNA

1Q. Will you port to older versions?

1A. No.

2Q. How often will you update and put out more bombs?

2A. Every month, if there is a bug, I will fix it and upload a new version early.

3Q. Will you make festive or holiday-related features?

3A. No.

4Q. What mod is recommended to play with, when this mod is installed.

4A. JEI is the most important. 

5Q. Will you add any non-bomb related things?

5A. Yes, Blaststeel will be used for other things than bombs.

6Q. Can I put this in a modpack?

6A. Of course, just add some credit.

7Q. Can I put this in a video?

7A. Yes, just add some credit.

## All the bombs so far

**Bomb** - A throwable item that explodes on impact.

**Firework Bomb** - On impact, an firework explosion will trigger.

**Decoy Bomb** - Simply, a non-functional bomb.

**Benefit Bomb** - Heals entities in the explosion.

**Dizzy Bomb** - Gives entities in the explosion nausea.

**Fire Bomb** - Sets mobs nearby ablaze.

**Involuntary Bomb** - Gives a new effect called, "Noluerunt." Which of course, forces a player to move.

**Copper Bomb** - Summons a lighting strike.

**Slime Bomb** - Slows entities down.

**Purpur Bomb** - Teleports entities to a random position, similar to a Chorus Fruit.

**Crimson Bomb** - Throws entities down.

**Warped Bomb** - Throws entities up.

All the rest can be found in-game.

#### Credits
@RSGuy - Artist and Programmer.
